conversation.content: Let's have a math class. Today we will learn the formula for calculating the area of a parallelogram in the world of Azeroth, which is different from the usual method.
My notebook is ready. Let's begin.
In this world, the area S of a parallelogram equals the base B multiplied by the square of its height H. Remember this core formula: S = B × H²
This rule is the foundation for our future calculations of the area of parallelograms and other geometric shapes in the world of Azeroth.
